items.name: 寛政の蜂起和人殉難墓碑
items.description: 明治45年5月珸瑶瑁で発見。当初は「寛政の乱和人殉難墓碑」として指定されていたが、昭和63年に現在の名称に変更された。

en.name_romaji: Kansei no Hōki Wajin Junnan Bohi
en.name_en: Memorial Grave Marker for the Wajin Casualties of the Kansei Uprising
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of a grave marker commemorating the Wajin casualties of the Kansei-era uprising. It is a municipally designated property located at Cape Nosappu in Nemuro City, designated on 25 July 1967.

items.name: 和田屯田兵碑
items.description: 明治22年6月建立。屯田兵歩兵第一中隊・第二中隊の業績を後世に伝えるための碑。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of a monument to the tonden (colonial militia) soldiers of Wada. It is a municipally designated property located at 954-2 Higashiwada, Nemuro City, designated on 29 July 1975.

items.name: 旧根室牧場大金庫
items.location: 根室市花咲港209 根室市歴史と自然の資料館
items.description: 明治30年頃から山県根室牧場にあったもの。越年資金を保管していた。

en.name_en: Large Safe of the Former Nemuro Ranch
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of the large safe of the former Nemuro ranch. It is a municipally designated property located at the Nemuro City Museum of History and Nature, 209 Hanasaki-kō, Nemuro City, designated on 9 January 1969.

items.name: 恵比寿像
items.location: 根室市花咲港209 根室市歴史と自然の資料館
items.description: 旧松前藩福山城の守護神として祀られていたと伝わる。座り像で高さ2メートル余りの組立式。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of a statue of Ebisu. It is a municipally designated property held at the Nemuro City Museum of History and Nature, 209 Hanasaki-kō, Nemuro City, designated on 25 June 1976.

items.name: 俄羅斯舩之圖及びワシレイラフロウ之圖
items.location: 根室市花咲港209 根室市歴史と自然の資料館
items.description: 1792年にラクスマン一行が乗ってきた帆船「エカテリーナ号」の絵図。

en.name_romaji: Roshia-sen no Zu oyobi Washireirafurō no Zu
en.name_en: Picture of a Russian Ship and Picture of Vasily Golovnin (?)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of a picture of a Russian ship and a picture titled "Washireirafurō." It is a municipally designated property held at the Nemuro City Museum of History and Nature, 209 Hanasaki-kō, Nemuro City, designated on 29 June 1993.

items.name: 穂香竪穴群出土の動物意匠付土器
items.location: 根室市花咲港209 根室市歴史と自然の資料館
items.description: 平成13年の穂香竪穴群発掘調査で出土。縄文時代後期初頭のもの。道東で最も古い動物意匠土器とされる。

en.name_romaji: Hoka Tateanagun Shutsudo no Dōbutsu Ishōtsuki Doki
en.name_en: Animal-Motif Pottery Excavated from the Hoka Pit-Dwelling Cluster
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of pottery with animal motifs excavated from the Hoka pit-dwelling cluster. It is a municipally designated property held at the Nemuro City Museum of History and Nature, 209 Hanasaki-kō, Nemuro City, designated on 7 March 2003.

items.name: アイヌ生活用具
items.location: 根室市花咲港209 根室市歴史と自然の資料館
items.description: 木綿衣1点、樹皮衣3点、前掛け1点が含まれる。明治20年代にホロモシリアイヌが作ったもの。

en.description_en: A tangible folk cultural property consisting of Ainu everyday-life implements. It is a municipally designated property held at the Nemuro City Museum of History and Nature, 209 Hanasaki-kō, Nemuro City, designated on 11 April 2007.

items.name: 珸瑶瑁獅子神楽
items.description: 富山県黒部市からの移住者を指導者として珸瑶瑁1区の青年が習い始めた。大正2年に歯舞光明寺の入仏式で舞ったのがきっかけとされる。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property in the form of a lion (shishi) kagura performance. It is a municipally designated property located in Nemuro City, designated on 9 January 1969.

items.name: ミズナラの風衝林
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 根室市豊里及び牧の内
items.description: 根室半島特有の強い季節風で枝が斜めに変形し丘状となった特異な景観のミズナラ群落。

en.description_en: A natural monument consisting of a wind-shaped (fūshō) forest of Mizunara oak. It is a municipally designated property located in Toyosato and Makinouchi, Nemuro City, designated on 25 February 1999.
